rationale: A minterm is a full elementary conjunction (def:elementary-conjunction) containing exactly one literal P_i or not-P_i per variable (def:literal). Both were missing from the empty set; dual of the maxterm fix (0072).
notes: The statement has a rendering gap where the genus term ('elementary conjunction') dropped out; inferred from context (minterm in DNF = complete elementary conjunction, dual to def:maxterm). Lower confidence -> focused re-run. The variable list P_1..P_n is ambient typing here.
